payload.title: Multifamily Residence Moderate-High Density (MF-4) District Regulations
payload.subsectionPath: Title 25 > Ch 25-2 Zoning > Subch C > Art 3 > Div 1
payload.bodyText: Site development regulations for the MF-4 (Multifamily Residence Moderate-High Density) district. The maximum height of a structure is 60 feet, a step up from the 40-foot MF-3 limit. MF-4 also permits higher density than MF-3. A change from MF-3 to MF-4 requires a rezoning approved by City Council. This section establishes the higher-intensity district that the entitlement finding identifies as the rezone path for the proposed 5-story building.

provenance.corpus: Austin LDC code corpus (Municode productId 15303 'Land Development Code')
provenance.produced: MF-4 max height (60 ft) for the rezone-path verification
provenance.citation: Austin Land Development Code §25-2-564 (MF-4 district regulations); MF-4 60 ft verified per docs/property_ground_truth.md directive.

reasoning: The ground-truth doc directs that the exact MF-4 height (60 ft) and the variance path be verified through the substrate before the entitlement finding ships. This atom carries the MF-4 60 ft figure from the Austin LDC corpus so the finding's rezone path (MF-3 -> MF-4) is itself provenance-backed rather than asserted in the finding alone.

confidence.stateNote: MF-4 60 ft height sourced from the Austin LDC corpus and cross-checked against the ground-truth doc directive. Not earned-calibrated.
